Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Compel Deft To Attend And Testify At Deposition And Produce For Inspection Documents Described In Deposition Notice And For Order Imposing Monetary Sanction Against Deft Andrew Govan-Smith And His Attorney Scott C. Stratman, Supporting Declaration Of Charles M. Collins, And E
Off Calendar Oct-22-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Charles M. Collins, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Ronald Green
Scott Stratman, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Andrew Govan-Smith

HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED with modification: Plaintiff RONALD GREEN'S Motion To Compel Defendant To Attend And To Testify At Deposition And Produce For Inspection Documents Described In Deposition Notice is granted as Defendant has offered the date of October 28, 2008. While there is an apparent dispute about the documents sought in the notice of deposition, the court will not make any orders regarding documents on this motion. However, counsel are advised that objections made to documents sought by a Demand For Production Of Documents do bar a demand for the same or similar documents in the Notice Of Deposition. All requests for sanctions are denied.

MODIFICATION:
- to be completed no later than Nov. 12, 2008.

ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.
COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Permit Pre Trial Discovery Of Defendant'S Financial Condition
Off Calendar Jun-24-2008 Denied
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: NONE
Tentative ruling adopted. Plaintiff Ronald Green's Motion For Order To Permit Pretrial Discovery Of Defendant's Financial Condition is denied. The court does not find that Plaintiff has established a substantial probability that he will prevail on his claim for punitive damages. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-23-2008 Set For Trial On Dec-01-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Nov-14-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 503
